surface_verification.runner: uv run --with pytest --with pytest-mock pytest shared/scripts/tests -q -p no:cacheprovider

behaviors.behavior: validate_env file-based tests stay green regardless of ambient os.environ (the red→green fix)
behaviors.evidence: worktree run under ambient NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=... → 59 passed; F0.5 cli runner shared/scripts/tests → 175 passed exit 0

behaviors.behavior: shared/scripts/tests collects + passes as a separate per-dir invocation (clean env)
arch-md test_arch_impact_drops_found_at_all SKIPs when decision-drops/ dir is absent (clean checkout)
behaviors.evidence: clean clone (drops absent) → 2 skipped (was 1 failed before fix)

behaviors.behavior: arch-md sibling STILL asserts when decision-drops/ dir is present (guard didn't neuter the check)
behaviors.evidence: worktree (drops present via main-repo redirect) → 2 passed

behaviors.behavior: shared/tests collects + passes/skips as a separate per-dir invocation under clean CI (no born-red)
behaviors.evidence: clean-clone CI sim with fixes → 2633 passed, 16 skipped, 0 failed
clean-clone CI sim → 51 passed; worktree F0 → 51 passed

behaviors.behavior: the three dirs in ONE pytest process still collide (negative control — proves separate invocations are required)
behaviors.evidence: reproduced 11 ModuleNotFoundError; F0.5 first attempt combining 2 dirs → ImportPathMismatchError('tests.conftest')

behaviors.behavior: validate_env.py comment-only edit changes no behavior
behaviors.evidence: full shared/scripts/tests green (175) after the net-zero comment edit

behaviors.behavior: GitHub Actions actually executing the new 'Run shared tests' CI step green on the live PR
behaviors.reason: the GitHub Actions runner is an external service; locally verified via a clean-clone CI simulation, confirmed for real only by observing the PR's CI run post-push

degraded.detail: External LLM cascade not run (proportionate for a CI/test-infra change with no product-logic, security, or data surface). An internal code-reviewer subagent reviewed the full diff and returned NO BLOCKERS + 3 NITs; the 2 substantive NITs (ci.yml collision-comment precision, conftest docstring) were fixed.

2 of the 4 named candidate tests were already green: arch-md test_every_arch_impact_drop_has_architecture_md_entry (skips cleanly in CI) and test_artifact_path_canon[compliance-migrated] (fixed on main by PR #122 / 658198f). The real born-red blocker was the arch-md SIBLING test_arch_impact_drops_found_at_all, found only via the clean-clone CI simulation.
